title: Breath From Dust

sections.label: Lyrics
lines: In a valley shadowed still, silence sings a mournful tune,
Bones scattered like whispered
prayers beneath a distant moon.
Echoes of lost promises, dust is their disguise,
Yet every silent fragment longs to rise.
Hear the wind begin to whisper,
Feel the pulse return, remember,
Hope is breathing in the ember.
Speak life, breathe deep, revive these bones,
Let the valley bloom, new flesh on stones,
Awake, arise, you are not alone,
From ashes we rise, finding home.
Here in shadows seeds take root, under the ancient sun,
What was lost becomes restored; rebirth has just begun.
Fragments gather, bones reconnecting once more,
Beauty in the brokenness, stronger than before.
Can you hear that rising thunder?
Life reclaimed in awe and wonder,
Hope awake from silent slumber.
Speak life, breathe deep, restore these bones,
Valley blooms anew, reclaiming stones,
Awake, arise, strength fully grown,
Together we rise, never alone.
Lift your voice, prophesy,
Let the breath within you fly,
Shatter silence, pierce the gloom,
Life returns, valley in bloom.
Speak life, breathe deep, these bones revive,
In radiant bloom, our souls alive,
Arise, awake, in hope we thrive,
Resurrected hearts, we now survive.
From silence we rise,
In breath we unite,
Alive, redeemed,
In radiant light.

epigraph: Thus saith the Lord GOD unto these bones
